caption: A man with a bald head, wearing a white collared shirt and a dark blazer, speaks while gesturing with his hands. He is positioned in the center of the scene against a blurred background where other people in casual attire, including t-shirts and blazers, are visible. As the sequence progresses, the man continues talking, and his hand gestures shift slightly. A banner runs across the bottom of the screen throughout the clip, featuring a blue cube logo and the text "MONGODB WORLD 2022," "#MDW22 | #theCUBE," and "theCUBE From the Javits Center, New York, NY." To the right of the banner, the text "Sponsored By" appears above a MongoDB logo. The lighting is consistent, and the camera remains focused on the man in a medium close-up shot as he interacts with an unseen audience.
